name: Provider → Account → Workspace unification (partial ship)
description: Conceptual model: every workspace lives under a Provider (Anthropic, OpenAI, Alibaba, GLM, Kimi, ...); each provider holds Accounts (OAuth identity OR API key); each account mounts into 0+ Workspaces. ORIGINAL plan was a full overhaul (vault rewrite + JSON contract v3 + full SweechBar UI rebuild + widget migration). What ACTUALLY shipped — by user direction after they stopped an over-reach — is the data-model + cosmetic SweechBar regrouping only. JSON contract on the CLI is unchanged; SweechBar's existing two-tab structure is preserved.
scopeNote: T-070 + T-072 + T-075 shipped to main. T-071 / T-073 / T-074 deferred and preserved at tags wave6/T-071-keep, wave6/T-073-keep, wave6/T-074-keep — they reflect a more ambitious redesign the user explicitly declined.
